page.title: Attendance Repair Center
page.subtitle: Repair attendance summaries, recalculate attendance-related data, and manage open attendance records.

notes.title: Attendance Processing, Validation & Repair Rules
notes.note1: Attendance repair operations may affect overtime calculations, bonuses, deductions, attendance summaries, and payroll-related calculations.
notes.note2: All attendance repair operations are processed using the employee, branch, or organization timezone configuration.
notes.note3: Approved payroll periods may restrict attendance recalculation or repair operations for protected payroll periods.
notes.note4: All repair actions are logged automatically for audit and historical tracking purposes.
notes.attendanceAutomationNote1: Attendance summaries are automatically recalculated based on each employee's timezone, work schedule, holidays, and attendance activity to ensure calculation accuracy and data consistency.
notes.attendanceAutomationNote2: Open attendance records without check-out are automatically reviewed every hour and may be invalidated after the configured grace period based on the employee's schedule and timezone.
notes.attendanceAutomationNote3: Employees may receive automatic warnings before attendance invalidation if check-out is still missing before the grace period expires.
notes.warning: ⚠️Repair actions may affect payroll and overtime calculations. Please review the notes carefully before proceeding

recalculate.title: Recalculate Day
recalculate.description: Recalculate attendance summary for a specific day
recalculate.payrollLocked: Payroll is locked for this period
recalculate.timezoneNote: Dates are processed using the employee, branch, or organization timezone depending on the selected repair scope.

closeOpen.title: Close Open Attendances
closeOpen.description: Invalidate attendance records with no check-out
closeOpen.timezoneNote: Dates are processed using the employee, branch, or organization timezone depending on the selected repair scope.
